parameters: Damn those imperials, looking down on us from that watchtower
We were going to knock the watchtower down, but we decided to
repurpose it for keeping an eye out for Ultra Beasts instead.
Eventually it'll be my turn... I feel like I'm just waiting for death.
Eventually it'll be my turn... I feel like I'm just waiting for death.
If you ever come face to face with an Ultra Beast, give it some feed.
Here, you can have some of mine.
They don't eat humans, despite what most people think.
Just how long will these tragedies continue...?
I have no good memories of this place, but I need to overcome
You should cover your faces. There's so much dust flying around.
You don't want it getting in your eyes.
If you've got any binoculars, keep them at the ready. You'll be able
to observe the Ultra Beast's eyes and mouth.
I don't want to see this, but I have to get my work here done...
We've made the switch to mining iron ore here. There'll be
I'll never be able to forget what happened here.
Is the Ultra Beast coming back?
We haven't even finished digging the other holes yet...
This site was built on the backs of so many sacrifices. We should
use it for the benefit of the survivors, not lock it away.
Apparently some big shot's showing up. Not that it has anything to
One day everyone who abused us will be crucified right here.
The Ultra Beasts are coming. I hope they don't look this way.
I always start shaking around this time of day...
What? You want a front-row seat? Weirdo.
Are the Ultra Beasts coming today?
The slave I usually talk to got taken away yesterday...
Sometimes Ultra Beasts wander this area. Don't worry, though.
